title: Consultation Paper on the Authorisation of Satellite Direct-to-Device Services in the Kingdom of Bahrain
summary: Proposed authorisation conditions for D2D services, including the licensing model, MSS and IMT spectrum use, technical conditions, interference management, licence variation approach, and safeguards for satellite and terrestrial network coexistence.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Consulted on the regulatory model for satellite direct-to-device services.

notes: Related instruments: Produced the 2025 D2D Decision Notice
